/usr/bin/ar qc libholyc_core.a CMakeFiles/holyc_core.dir/token.c.o CMakeFiles/holyc_core.dir/diag.c.o CMakeFiles/holyc_core.dir/utils.c.o CMakeFiles/holyc_core.dir/lexer/lexer.c.o CMakeFiles/holyc_core.dir/ast/ast.c.o CMakeFiles/holyc_core.dir/types/types.c.o CMakeFiles/holyc_core.dir/symbol/symbol.c.o CMakeFiles/holyc_core.dir/parser/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/holyc_core.dir/semantic/semantic.c.o CMakeFiles/holyc_core.dir/codegen/codegen.c.o CMakeFiles/holyc_core.dir/driver/driver.c.o CMakeFiles/holyc_core.dir/main.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libholyc_core.a
